new_classes.label_en: Other Mineral Water and Aerated Water (CN 2201 10 90)
new_classes.definition_en: Mineral waters and aerated waters falling under CN subheading 2201 10 90, comprising all mineral waters and carbonated (aerated) waters other than natural mineral water as defined in HS Explanatory Note heading 2201 paragraphs (B) and (C), and excluding natural mineral water in aerosol containers for skin care (heading 3304).

Water artificially charged with carbon dioxide, classified under CN 2201 10 as aerated water; distinct from natural mineral water by the artificial addition of carbonation rather than natural mineral content.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the two main product types within CN 2201 10 90: (1) mineral and aerated waters other than natural mineral water (modelled as OtherMineralOrCarbonatedWater, distinguished by complement of NaturalMineralWaterQuality), and (2) aerated water (modelled as AeratedWater, bearing CarbonatedQuality). The exclusion of natural mineral water in aerosol containers for skin care (heading 3304) is partially represented by a complement restriction on a hypothetical AerosolContainer class; however, eucn:AerosolContainer does not exist in the current TBox and cannot be formally introduced without further context, so the aerosol-exclusion axiom carries advisory value only and slightly reduces coverage. The HS Explanatory Note references to paragraphs (B) and (C) of heading 2201 cannot be fully formalised without the full text of those paragraphs, leaving some definitional nuance uncaptured. Overall coverage is estimated at 0.75.
